sample_comments.text: Khách sạn rất sạch sẽ và phòng rộng rãi với nhiều tiện nghi tuyệt vời. Một điều mà chúng tôi không hiểu được là thái độ của cô gái ở quầy ăn sáng. Ngày đầu tiên khi chúng tôi đến lúc 8:50 sáng để ăn sáng, cô ấy đang đóng cửa vì "không có ai đến". Chúng tôi vẫn có bữa sáng của mình, nhưng cô ấy đã đuổi hai cặp đôi sau chúng tôi. Ngày thứ hai, cô ấy chỉ nói chuyện điện thoại suốt thời gian, to tiếng tư vấn cho ai đó về chuyện cá nhân. Ngoài ra, khách sạn thật sự hoàn hảo.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ này thật sạch sẽ và dễ tiếp cận. Phòng tôi thật tuyệt - rộng rãi, nhà tắm đẹp, có tủ lạnh, lò vi sóng, v.v. Nhân viên thân thiện. Bữa sáng thì tạm được - sẽ tốt hơn nếu có chuối thay vì táo làm lựa chọn trái cây!
sample_comments.title: Nơi tuyệt vời để ở gần Đấu Trường Colosseum.
No pleased at all!
sample_comments.negatives: The fact that I drove 2hrs and 45mins to this hotel only to be told my reservation waa canceled due to them not receiving payment when the booking through this app said that it was a "no prepayment needed" and that i could pay at the property! This was NOT news anybody wants to here when they've driven so far. The lady at the front desks answer was "I dont knkw why booking told you that. We don't have that option here. They need to change that." She didn't even bother wanting to ask if I wanted to rebook or anything because the room was definitely still available. Very unprofessional of her to represent this hotel in this way.

sample_comments.title: If you like a mildew and unkept hotel stay here
sample_comments.text: Mildew and leaky bathroom that was attempted patch fixes over time. We stayed because of the breakfast that could be seen online, they only offer a to go bag which is a joke. The pool was also not kept up with the chemicals. This place seems like a good place to get sick

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel smelled in the lobby and elevators were in bad shape. The wifi didn't work.

sample_comments.title: Trash
sample_comments.text: This location is perfect being by ptc & the highway but they have signs up offering complementary grab and go breakfast but all they had was eating utensils and Frosted flakes cereal no milk no juice nothing. Pool was filthy and staff was very rude. Not to mention during my check out I took my belongings to my car and the maid was walking to the room and my shoes are now missing

sample_comments.title: Terrible from start
sample_comments.negatives: I had to reach out to general manager to get someone to check me in. I had to send emails to get someone's attention. When the workers finally surfaced after a 30 minute wait in lobby it was obvious that the operations manager and the front desk worker were somewhere in the hotel sleep. I honestly wanted to cancel my reservation after that, but I know I would still be charged. There was also credit card information from another desk visible on the counter. I will never stay at a Comfort Inn again and will definitely spread the word about their service.

sample_comments.title: Overpriced
sample_comments.text:
The rooms do not look as in pictures. No bright coverlet, just white comforter. Sink drain in bathroom was broken and hairdryer did not work.

Booked this hotel because of their wonderful breakfast. They only gave us a bag to go for our breakfast. That info should be on their website!

Room was clean and beds were comfortable, but way overpriced for what you get!

sample_comments.title: The stay was absolutely a nightmare.
sample_comments.negatives: Everything

sample_comments.title: A motel at a hotel price
sample_comments.text:
It felt more like a motel. The rooms are pretty spacious - that's the plus. The mattress and the pillows were pretty awful. The window doesn't open, so the air was stale. The room and the hotel had some cleanliness issues. They're probably short-staffed. 
In the evening there were some drunk teenagers roaming around the parking lot and the hotel lobby/gym/pool areas. I didn't feel safe.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: My experience with this hotel was horrible and I didn't even get to stay there. I had planned a last minute trip to Hampton for my birthday weekend and on the day of my reservation, I had to have emergency surgery and was unable to make my reservation. I did let them know before hand that I was gonna be unable to make my reservation as well. I called the following week trying to get a refund because the reason for missing my reservation was an emergency. Every single time I called for 2 weeks the general manager avoided my calls even tho I was told he was on site. I left countless voicemails and called multiple times a day and was avoided. It was very unprofessional and so rude. I eventually called customer relations and they requested a refund from the hotel which the manager eventually told them that they wouldn't be giving me a refund because they didn't want to. The manager wouldn't answer my calls to tell me this themselves but told customer relations on the other line this while I waited. Then Customer relations offered me 12,000 points which they said was enough for a free night at one of their hotels and it absolutely wasn't enough for a free night. Most hotels of theirs require 16,000-20,000 points for a free night. I'm so very disappointed with this company and this hotel. I will not be staying here again or any of their hotels.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The bed sheets had some stains on them and the bathroom had a previous persons used rag hanging and hair in the tub

sample_comments.title: Should not have offer a room after fumigation
sample_comments.negatives:
Couldn't sleep because of chemical smell that I believe was for insects.
Room was not made up once in three days.

sample_comments.title: Room for improvement
sample_comments.text: The room was spacious and quiet, and sheets were fresh, but other things, like the sitting chair needed cleaned. Every time we left and came back our room key stopped working and had to be rekeyed. They were out of creamer the entire time we were there. They weren't doing real breakfast but grab and go, and it was seriously lacking. By our last morning they didn't even have yogurt. It was really unusual. On the plus side, they had an indoor pool, that was unfortunately unheated, and the towel cart was always empty. It wasn't the worst place I've stayed, but it had room for improvement.

sample_comments.title: High rate for the less than minimum wage
sample_comments.negatives: The high rate and the 150$ deposit

sample_comments.title: Good value but Not for family travel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is conveniently located at the center of the city, only 5 minutes from the heart of shopping and other places. The staff are friendly and helpful. The problem is that it is a basic hotel, without sound proof. You can hear people talking from next door. If you have a bad Neighbour, in my cases, 3 teenagers living next door, things are out of control. Loud music played throughout the night until 4 am and several complaints. I would try to stay in a better hotel next time in town.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: The a.c. in my room did not work....and it was 84+ degrees in there....all night. I could not sleep. I had to sleep in the lobby eating area juat to get a couple hours sleep ....and I had a 5 hour drive the next day. It was horrible.

sample_comments.title: Weekend getaway
sample_comments.text:
Check in Waa quick easy and wonderful Nice and quiet weekend stay. Room was spacious and comfortable.

Breakfast was just breakfast. No protein (meat), for some reason the WiFi disconnected at midnight but the front desk gives you a new code for the WiFi, it wasn't mentioned at checking the WiFi goes off at midnight.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: I didn't get to stay at the hotel because I booked it and had the price for one amount and when I got there the lady go say I need to have a deposit first and then the room was higher when she seen me and plus they are racist!!! I would not recommend this hotel if you are of color they will throw in the deposit once you get there

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: I had a pleasant stay at this hotel. The place is clean and well-maintained, which made me feel comfortable during my visit. They also offer a decent breakfast.Overall, it was a good experience, and I would consider staying here again.

sample_comments.title: I don't like the stay
sample_comments.negatives: They lied and said I was smoking to keep my money

sample_comments.title: Tien Nguyen
sample_comments.text: Good value hotel new renovation definitely will be back

sample_comments.title: It served purpose for the weekend; however, I will never stay at this location ever again.
sample_comments.positives: The young man who prepared area for breakfast each morning was totally awesome. He was very friendly and hospitable. He went out of his way to make sure everyone's need were met.
sample_comments.negatives: Not sure who Mr. Patel is, however, he was very rude. If he is general Manager or even owner; He is very unprofessional. I would never choose this hotel again and will tell everyone I know to not book accommodations at that location. It is very unfortunate since the location is a great area. There was a large group planning to book there, however, I told them about our experience, and they chose elsewhere. So, Mr. Patel sharpen up on your customer service skills. Money talks and I plan to discourage anyone from booking at your location. I had an unpleasant interaction with him before I even arrived at the property. The air was not consistent throughout the hotel. There were areas that were very musty. Our refrigerator in the room was barely cool. Entire hotel could stand for complete upgrades.

sample_comments.title: Clean
sample_comments.text: My accommodations were clean and comfortable. Breakfast was great!

sample_comments.title: I wish I would have stayed somewhere else.
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast attendant guy was so sweet and the black lady and guy at the front desk at check-in.
sample_comments.negatives: The general manager, Patel was disgustingly rude.

sample_comments.title: Excellent location and staff
sample_comments.text: The hotel was going through some renovations during our stay, but these were nearing completion. A little dirty in hallways from the work - but you could see that the upgrades would make things better looking. Updated features were already installed in our room (bathroom fixtures upgraded, lights/outlets updated in our room - lights had USB ports for charging electronic devices). Staff was very friendly and helpful.

sample_comments.title: Not Impressed
sample_comments.positives: The location was decent and away from everything. Very quiet. Also, the bed was comfy and the room is decorated very nicely.
sample_comments.negatives:
I specifically asked, before checking in, if the pool was operational. The desk attendant said yes. After checking in and visiting the pool, the water was murky and smelly and according to the water quality results posted on the wall, the water hadn't been checked in over 2 weeks. Also, the hot tub had been filled in with cement and rocks. 
Furthermore, the breakfast was horrible, there's not much parking, and there was a dirty washcloth hanging in the shower.

sample_comments.title: Nice facility for an extended stay
sample_comments.text: Nice facility with plenty of amenities. Large rooms. We stayed 3 days/2 nights - large rooms made a longer stay comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The bed was hard and uncomfortable. It made my back hurt

sample_comments.title: Value
sample_comments.text: Quality room for the price

sample_comments.title: Please stop advertising a "heated pool". It definitely was not.
sample_comments.negatives: Cold pool water and strong mildew smell in room. Locked out of our rooms at 10 when check out was 11. So frustrating.

sample_comments.title: Clean comfortable rooms
sample_comments.text: The rooms are a little old and dated, but they were clean and comfortable. Price was extremely reasonable. For whatever reason, breakfast was not offered. This was offset by the price of the rooms and the fact we were visiting family, so meals weren't an issue. Overnight desk staff was amazing. Would gladly stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The staff were extremely friendly but I was shocked when we told the gentleman behind the desk about the cockroach it was brushed off as it was nothing like an ant.
sample_comments.negatives: I booked 2 rooms for my family and woke up to a large cockroach crawling around the room and on us. This was extremely disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Bathroom could have been cleaner. Faucets in the bathtub had rust around them . The floor around the bottom of the toilet wasn't clean.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Over booked had to get two queen beds and not a king like I paid for

sample_comments.title: Decent
sample_comments.text: It was decent for what I needed it for. I'd stay here again

sample_comments.title: Not good at all.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Toilet is too low that's a toilet for a little kid. 
2. No mat in tub so you do not fall. 
3. Internet was bad. 
4. Breakfast was all carbs no protein (meat) 
6. No freezer in fridge. 
I did not like the quality of the room for the money I paid. This hotel should not charge what they charge for horrible room. I will not stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable
sample_comments.text: Great hotel value for the money

sample_comments.title: It is not suitable for a family or if you are looking for a affordable modern clean hotel
sample_comments.negatives:
They only have 5 routers on premise that don't always connect to the rooms .. the WiFi was down for every day of my stay. They gave me a tech support number who was unable to get my WiFi started. 

The carpet is old and germy. They need hardwood floors. 
Workers used their shoes to come into the room. Some comforters had stains on them. Vents had heaps of dust. 
Corners of rooms had dust and dirt. 

Breakfast included is cafeteria school lunch. Eggs are watery and tasteless. Very basic basic free breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The hotel is super clean and the room was specious with great amenities. one thing that we couldn't understand was the attitude of the lady at the breakfast bar. first day when we arrived at 8:50 am for breakfast, she was closing because "nobody showed up". We still got our breakfast, but she chased away two couples after us. Second day, she was just on the phone the entire time, loudly advising somebody on personal matter. Other than that the hotel is perfect.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Yes I ask for a late check out and I was told maybe instead of yes or no. Then they made so much noise that I had to just get up and be out by 11:00 that's not good. But I know you really don't care.

sample_comments.title: Good value and clean!
sample_comments.text: The hotel is easy to get to and central to many amenities such as restaurants and the Coliseum. The bed was very comfortable and the room was spacious. Breakfast was OK - it would be nice to have a fruit available (none available during this stay).

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: No housekeeping at all. The room phone wasn't working at even after I the night desk person about it.

sample_comments.title: Highly recommend
sample_comments.text: Very clean almost new. Nice staff very polite. The breakfast was good too. This will be my go to when l am in the area .

sample_comments.title: Overvalued!
sample_comments.positives: I like the beds comfort. I also liked that a fridge and microwave was in the room. And I liked that the pool was inside.
sample_comments.negatives: Our sink kept leaking and making a noise. The breakfast was very subpar. The property was overpriced compared to the esthetics.

sample_comments.title: Comfort through quality
sample_comments.text: A great stay, with a splendid staff. From top to bottom customer service was phenomenal! Very warm and homely. It was a pleasure & would definitely recommend!

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: No parking on premises. Had to park on street due to no available parking. $150 Incidental fee that was not announced at time of check in.

sample_comments.title: Pleasantly surprised
sample_comments.text: I was really surprised to see how clean and lovely the hotel was. The staff was welcoming and very helpful. I will go back there again.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: There was only one person working the desk. My room was not clean & the toilet was broke upon arrival.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Great stay, quiet, clean and cost efficient.

sample_comments.title: Rooms was barely clean had to put me in different room.
sample_comments.positives: How Close it was to the airport.
sample_comments.negatives: Understaffed

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Value for money! Clean and comfortable stay.

sample_comments.title: Not a suite like the picture and description says
sample_comments.positives: It had space and breakfast and work out thing
sample_comments.negatives: I didn't get the coach and sitting area
